---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear description of the problem. E.g. "It's frustrating when..."

**Proposed Solution**
Describe the feature you'd like. Be specific about which role (Student/Faculty/Admin) benefits.

**Alternatives Considered**
List any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional context**
Any mockups, screenshots, or examples that help illustrate the feature.
